holdings.name: NTPC Ltd
holdings.description: India's largest power utility with 73 GW operational capacity. Government holds 51%. Transitioning to renewables with 60 GW RE target by 2032. Regulated tariff model.

holdings.name: Coal India
holdings.description: World's largest coal miner producing 700+ MT annually. Government holds 63%. Dividend yield 6-8%. Essential for India's thermal power generation.

holdings.name: ONGC
holdings.description: India's largest oil and gas explorer producing 70% of domestic crude. Government holds 58%. KG deepwater field adding production.

holdings.name: Power Grid Corporation
holdings.description: India's monopoly inter-state power transmission PSU owning 175,000+ circuit km. Government holds 51%. Regulated 15.5% post-tax ROE.

holdings.name: Indian Oil Corporation
holdings.description: India's largest oil company by revenue with 80 MMTPA refining capacity. 33,000+ fuel stations. Government holds 52%.

holdings.name: BPCL
holdings.description: Third-largest PSU oil company. Kochi, Mumbai and Bina refineries. Gas, LNG and EV charging diversification. Privatisation narrative creates re-rating events.

holdings.name: Bharat Electronics
holdings.description: Defence electronics PSU with Rs 65,000+ Cr order backlog. Radar, sonar, electronic warfare systems. Government holds 51%.

holdings.name: GAIL India
holdings.description: India's largest natural gas marketing and transmission company. 12,000+ km pipeline network. Government holds 51%.

holdings.name: SAIL
holdings.description: India's largest integrated steel producer with 19+ MT capacity. Government holds 65%. Five integrated plants across Eastern India.

holdings.name: HAL
holdings.description: India's sole military aircraft manufacturer. LCA Tejas, Dhruv helicopter. Rs 1.3 lakh Cr order book. Government holds 71%.
